creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
If I switch to UEFI boot, the symptoms change a little:

Now I can suspend and wake up as often as I want and don't get graphics glitches, as long as I do so from the text console. Waking up from suspend from an X server seems to fail, leaving me with a system that no longer reacts to inputs (or at least it seems so, let me test a bit more to ensure this was not a fluke).
